title: Code-G Artifact
html_prompt: Create a responsive single-file HTML/CSS/JS preview for an EC LAB scroll-driven transition experience. Start with a warm beige full-screen stage featuring a stylized human face (hair, eyebrows, eyes, and a mouth). The face subtly tilts and looks toward the mouse/touch position using CSS variables and 3D transforms. As the user scrolls (or swipes), the mouth scales up from a small circle to a large portal that fills the entire screen, revealing a deep burgundy homepage underneath. Add cute details like upper teeth and a tongue inside the mouth, an animated 'Scroll Up' hint that fades out, and a final WELCOME page with an ENTER HOME button. Use smooth lerp-based animation via requestAnimationFrame, wheel/touch event listeners, and a snap behavior that settles to either 0 or 1. Build everything with HTML, CSS, inline SVG if needed, gradients, shadows, transforms, and Tailwind CDN utility classes. Preserve the playful, organic feel and the dramatic portal reveal. Use EC LAB / ec 的实验室 identity where appropriate.

css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
